subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou knowest what lieth hidden within my heart and in the depths of my being, and how its fire can be quenched and its flames extinguished [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت تعلم کمون قلبی و صمیم فوادی و کیف تخمد ناره و یطفی نیرانه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for nearness to God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
